review_text:
Excellent caravan park with friendly operators who helped find a really nice available site for my van.
Whilst some are open mine was bordered by trees and shrubs and bet spacious and not too close to others.
Amenities were clean and fresh with a new large communal fire pit.
2min walk to Long Jetty and fishing if interested.
It's a lovely piece of Victoria down that way.
very tidy caravan park. Quiet. Nice amenities for families. Enjoyed our stay.
We had a caravan site with power and water. Big sites and a huge park. Situated at the start of the Long Jetty.  Clean amenities, spotless grounds a very friendly  staff. Loved it.
We stayed for 7 nights with our van. The amenities are excellent and clean. Very close to the Jetty.  Would recommend anytime.

I stayed in my caravan for two nights. I found the park to be very well maintained, tidy and clean. There was a new shower block, a well equipped camp kitchen and the sites were spacious.
Only a short stroll to the beach and Long Jetty. I would definitely stay again
Such a beautiful caravan park , I called last minute to get a spot to stay the night and got one straight away not to mention the very friendly staff
Very clean room and the staff is very nice and friendly plus it's just next to the long Jetty where you can cast your line straight away. Highly recommended.
Great place to stay. Helpful pleasant staff amenities very good. Well maintained grounds. We will be back definitely

The best park I've been to. Location perfect, sites are huge, even the unpowered.  Clean amenities and the staff are so friendly and helpful.  The price for my unpowered was not over the top. Port Welshpool is a very walkable dog friendly town and so quaint.  Staff at the General store were so kind and friendly.  Thank you Long Jetty Caravan Park and your lovely village Port Welshpool.  Hopefully we will be back.
Hidden gem, loved our stay!!!
Cabin 8 couples cabin lively spacious the only thing was 1 out of 4 jets on the oven top  worked otherwise fantastic cabin
Fantastic caravan Park we love coming here with our dogs such a peaceful place to stay can't wait to come back great site's and amenities.
The owner was very helpful and friendly.  The site was huge and private.  The toilets and showers were very well maintained and clean

Nice quiet grassy caravan park next to the ocean and the long jetty. Friendly staff. Clean facilities.  The jetty was rebuilt <10 years ago to include fisherman shelters and fishing rod holders /seats. Very delicious restaurant just down the road -The Rusty Gurnard is well worth a visit for week made meals in a very pleasant building. Would not hesitate to stay here again.

Took up the offer of stay for 6 pay for 4 which was great value.
The park itself has really good amenities including a fire pit, enclosed bbq area and recreation room. They are all kept spotlessly clean.
We had a dog friendly cabin which also was very clean, however we found the bedroom area and bathroom  very small. Another post suggested removing the bunk beds and extending the bedroom/ bathroom which would have made it a lot more comfortable which we completely agree with.
Kitchen could use a few more utensils and cooking pots/pans etc as the lack of shops in Port Welshpool means you have to do most of your own cooking.
A lovely park with friendly and helpful staff close to the pier which was convenient.

Great caravan park,  very clean amenities,  big powered sites, great access to long jetty and friendly and helpful staff. Have been twice and will definitely be back again. Good value for money with free nights.
Always a great stay . The staff are friendly and helpful.

We really enjoyed our stay at  the BIG4 in Port Welshpool. Good value for money with a large site close to the amenities block and great camp kitchen and rec. room. Friendly informative staff, just a short walk to the “Long Jetty”
Thanks Amanda & Jess for assisting great stay….. we’ll be back.
P.s. great food at the pub. 🤣

Great one night stay in the tiny cabin. So lovely to sit on the deck for evening drinks and morning coffee. Comfy bed, small but awesome shower. Very friendly and helpful staff. Perfect location for Great Southern Rail Trail

Very clean,  quiet park.
Will definitely be back.

Beautiful friendly caravan park very clean and tidy with a great atmosphere. The staff were fantastic letting me change my booking last minute when I realised I’d made a mistake with the dates and even gave us a late checkout because we’d be arriving late. Will definitely be back!!

Location of park is ideal in terms of access to popular Long Jetty. Our cabin was dated and in need of some refurbishment. Park itself is well appointed and perfect for fishermen as boats can be parked adjacent to accommodation. Strangely there are some caravan spots right next door to some cabins.
Very enjoyable relaxing stay thank you
Beautiful spot close to Port Welshpool Jetty. Luscious green grass van sites. Great staff plus they just opened a beautiful communal fire pit for 5pm arvos

Stayed 2 nights in our caravan on a powered site. Sites were big and grassy and the kids loved the playground. On our stay there was a cinema night at the park which was a big hit with the kids. Caravan park is only a short walk to the jetty and pub.
Very fast efficient check in. Clean and modern cabins. Great for a fishing trip. Could not fault.
Love this place, sites are generous and lush green grass. Very well looked after and staff are great
Stayed tiny cabin, all we needed while riding great southern rail trail. Located next to the pier great spot.

Highly recommend this lovely park, sites are well maintained, amenities are very clean and staff super friendly and helpful. So great to stay in a dog friendly park. Amazing location with the beach and jetty so close. Loved our stay and will be back soon! 10/10 from us 😊
Good stay just noisy drunk people next door

I enjoyed my non-powered site. The bathroom block was clean, and the camp kitchen was spotless. The receptionist gave me immediate and accurate information, in a friendly manner. I enjoyed my walk to the pub for a great meal.

We had a very pleasant stay in our motorhome - sites are large and private   (but on the last day someone parked within 6 feet of us). Maybe we were not positioned properly for the site!!!
Bathrooms were clean and well maintained. Office staff were delightful.
Also dog friendly.
Short walk out the side of the park to access the long jetty.
Would definitely stay here again.
Easy to deal with. Beautiful location. Close to railtrail.

Stayed in the caravan park. Great facilities, amenities block modern, clean and great hot water flow. Good barbecue area and rec room. Great grassed large sites and because it wasn’t very busy vacant sites right next to us.

Booked a 2-night stay for our fishing trip. Location was great and the camp grounds were well maintained, clean and peaceful. Cabin was perfect, it had everything we needed. Glad that pet-friendly cabins are available and that our dog could come with us. Definitely worth coming back for another relaxing stay.

Camping at Long Jetty Caravan Park was absolutely amazing.
It was peaceful, with beautiful scenery, and there’s a long jetty right in front of the park that’s perfect for fishing.
All the facilities were clean and very well maintained.
Most of all, the staff were incredibly friendly and even provided helpful information without us having to ask.
Thank you for such a great experience.
I’ll definitely be coming back. Highly recommended!

The cabin was very spacious and clean. The caravan park is conveniently located right next to the long jetty. Unfortunately we didn't catch any fish or squid this time.

It would be nice to have medium height pillow. All of the pillows were too high for us.

Overall, we are happy with our experience
Had a lovely few days at Long Jetty caravan park. What a great park and such friendly helpful staff. Facilities very clean as are grounds. Will definitely be visiting again. Thanks everyone.
What a lovely hidden spot, we'll be back.
Amenities were spotless, as was the park. We stayed in caravan so cant score the cabins. Staff on arrival were very friendly, helpful and informative.
Great Caravan Park. Friendly staff. Clean amenities.

We recently stayed at BIG4 Port Welshpool Holiday Park, and I had a really positive experience.
From the moment we arrived, the welcome was warm and friendly, which made our stay very comfortable. The park itself was well maintained and had a great atmosphere.
What truly stood out, though, was the exceptional honesty and kindness of the staff. After checking out, I realized I had accidentally left my pouch with important cards behind. Alica from one of the staff contacted me promptly to let me know and reassured me not to worry. She personally followed up, retrieved the item from the lost property, and arranged to have it posted back to me.
I’m incredibly grateful for her effort and care. It really shows that when the staff are responsible and genuinely helpful, the hospitality of the place shines through.
Highly recommend this place, not just for the stay, but for the amazing people who make it special.

Great park to stay with family.
Did some fishing and site seeing around the area

My first time there . With my caravan  it was very comfortable showers and toilets were good for there age.  Good water pressure etc plenty of buildings for entertaining in and cooking in if needed a great spot if you love fishing  with the long jetty just out the gate  . It's a well run park  thanks.
We love it here, friendly staff, and it’s a place we always come to for a getaway.
Staff very friendly.  Powered camp sites large.
Love camping at the long jetty caravan park, staff is always friendly and helpful. The amenities are very clean and tidy!!
A beautiful location and dog friendly caravan park. Modern and clean facilities. Lush green and  flat sites, generous in size. Highly recommend
Very nice and tidy place, awesome showers and toilets and kept very clean
The Long Jetty Holiday Park always delivers! Great spot for a relaxing holiday to recharge the senses! Good fishing too. Love the location directly by the sea with easy access for watersport.
Great park, nice surprise for the kids, Easter eggs, also had a food  truck come into the park was delicious.

We needed to get away 🏃 and what a superb rest we had. Our site was magnificent, secluded, private and peaceful.😌
Thank you see you next year 🙂
Going back

A lovely place to stop. Very friendly staff, excellent facilities and very well maintained. Decided to stay another night. However, our site was already booked and that site was requested. The lovely lady in the front office called and asked if the person minded changing. They didn’t mind so we stayed. That is exceptional service in our opinion. Will happily return.

We found this to be the most relaxing peaceful well maintained lawns and amenities etc
Sites are large and grass is great !
A big shout out to Alisa in the office for being so accommodating and knowledgeable 👍
Great feel
There is a pub and general store walking distance.
The town of Welshpool is only a few minutes away for supplies
We will be back

Bloody amazing place this
The rooms were very tidy and well set out
Plenty of room for parking boats and cars
The staff were fantastic to deal with and will definitely be back soon
Also very child friendly so will be bringing the family along .
Just returned from a group weekend away for 15 people.  Great cabins and service and facilities

This park is great. So spacious. Caravans are not crammed in. Cabins are well spaced. Close to the amazing Long Jetty and a short stroll to the General Store and pub.  The general store has best fish and chips and burgers, whilst the pub has exceptional meals.  Overall worth a stay at Port Welshpool.
Absolutely brilliant, very happy with this caravan park. Friendly helpful staff and amenities always clean. Lawns neat and tidy. Great place!
Friendly and helpful. Great location. Good clean facilities and not too expensive.

Caravan site was large with power and water. Tv reception good. we had shady trees. Long jetty was a great walk we had a fish but no luck. Would definitely stay again.
Cameron and Trina
Unpowered site.
Nice caravan park, roomy sites and friendly staff.  Location great but clearly best for people who are there to fish
Caravan sites really large and private. Amenities nice and clean. Had an dxcelkdnt 3 nights.
Fantastic caravan park good fishing

Awesome caravan park! Extremely well kept & clean. Caravan sites are spacious, kids loved the play ground. Great location for fishing off the jetty, can buy bait at reception too! Would recommend & I’ll definitely return!

Unfortunately it was raining when we arrived and our spot was a bit boggy but was helped out straight away by the lovely staff and mived to a dryer spot. Only stay a couple of night while in transit but enjoyed our stay regardless of the weather
Nice clean Park  friendly staff
Off season travelling, so nice and quiet.  We had a Spacious site backing on to the community bowling club, which hubby enjoyed a few games. Walked the jetty. Well maintained.
Great place for a get away, Clean and very functional Cabins at a reasonable price. walking distance for a fishing venture at the Long Jetty
Great location with sites spread out to give  plenty of room. Close to the pub for dinner. Facilities were  clean.

Another great stay. Extended our stay from 4 days to a week because the weather was so good. Took the new boat out and managed to land some gummies and flathead.
Thanks again for another great stay. See you next time.
Highly recommend Big4 Long Jetty Caravan Park. Staff are friendly everything is clean and the updated camp kitchen looks great.
Big thumbs up

Great place for camping and fishing.
Kid friendly and very clean facilities.
The only downside there is a blanket ban on canp fires for half of the year in this area.

v clean, well equipped and appointed, manager very helpful with items I left behind by dropping them.off at the local post office.
will stay here again no worries
Big grassy sites and spotless facilities, will stay here again.
Was everything we needed and wanted for our weekend away. We had a pet friendly cabin which was great. The quilts on the bunks weren’t super fresh but the sheets were clean.

Great park, huge campsites.
We will definitely be back

Great park  for camping not cramped up near others

Only missing a pool
But close to beach makes up for it

Will be back again
Friendly service, sites have plenty of room for van and camp set up everything you need . In a great location walk straight out of park onto to beach
Extra large caravan sites, with a comfortable rec and games room for all year use. Nice touch having free afternoon entertainment.
Beautifullly presented caravan park  lovely & green, plenty of space at rear near gate to long jetty.

Awesome caravan park , great location.
The manager that booked us in was very polite and professional. Don’t think I’ve ever been happier with a caravan park . 100% the best park ever
Water taps leaking and told the office,but no one came to fix it and the midges were not good but other then that we had a good stay

My stay was the second time 12 months apart. The camping grounds and facilities are magnificently managed and maintained. Office staff are kind and helpful
Other campers seemed considerate of others around them and mostly up for a good morning and a chat. Met some nice folk

Basic but clean and tidy holiday park. Kids loved the playground. Very close walk to the Jetty. Not as much to do at the actual premises as some of the Big4's but beach is close, good if you like fishing. Very quiet and relaxing.

Lovely caravan park, park amenities were spotless. We didn't use the camp kitchen or playground but they look fantastic too. We stayed in a drive through powered site in our van. Short walk to the Long Jetty, even caught a fish. We will definitely be back again.
Peaceful Park,Excellent ammenities.

Very friendly helpful service. Stayed on a large powered site. Park is clean and tidy with good location, jetty across the road and a short walk to pub and general store. Was able to do some of the rail trails also.
Lovely quiet park, large grassy sites, amenities block clean, but could do with an update

Great Caravan Park ,Good size grassed site , Clean amenities and the Park is Dog friendly, Access gate down to great walkways , Long Jetty and the Waterfront, Friendly Staff,
Whilst Port Welshpool is sparse it is a great base for exploring the South Gippsland area 👌

Beautiful park lovely powered sites and great amenities thank you
Cheers Steve
Great spot with very roomy powered camp sites. Good boating and fishing.
Brilliant Small Caravan Park ,Good size sites and Very clean amenities
Nice park with good amenities at a great location

Enjoyed our weekend away even though the weather turned. Extremely clean and well kept.
Also Pet friendly

Car tenting holiday, stayed at Port Welshpool long Jetty park, all staff helpful & friendly, camp kitchen had adequate equipment & very clean, relaxed in the activities room, also very clean & comfortable, other amenities also clean, I liked there were trees around many of the sites, for us was a good wind break with the tent. Will stay there again.
Great location for a Van park loved the camp kitchen and large grass sites

What a lovely place- a town like the ‘old days’  no trendy anything, one shop ( post office & fish n chips in one, true!) along shore- beautiful beaches to walk along, a really long jetty as the name suggests… super dog friendly - one polite sign and none of the NO this and that bull… park itself is great, friendly and helpful staff, nice modern facilities and easy access to Terra Bulga NP rainforest and other local paces- highly recommended! ( stayed in tent so can’t rate cabins/ rooms)
Sehr nett empfangen worden 😊 Saubere Toiletten & Duschen, wie auch Campkitchen & Aufenthaltsraum.
Great camp with roomy sites, clean facilities and great walk to the Jetty and beaches
It was so lovely their we stayed an extra week. Lovely clean park. We were in a caravan. Grounds nice. Owners/managers very friendly.

Staff are great and informative.   Helpful to length and width of your vehicle on site.   Relaxing and enjoyable place to walk, ride a bike to grab fish and chips at the general store, or go to the pub for a meal.  All looking at the water

We stayed on an unpowered site at Long Jetty Caravan Park and found it to be excellent value for money. Our site itself wasn’t very large, but there were definitely bigger sites available throughout the park. It would be worth checking the park map in advance and requesting a specific site if space is important to you, especially if you have a larger setup.

The location is one of the standout features. Being right next to the Long Jetty and the beach makes it perfect for relaxing walks, whether during the day or at sunset. The coastal setting gives the park a peaceful and laid-back atmosphere.

The amenities were well maintained, and the bathrooms were clean and within easy walking distance from all areas of the park, which made things very convenient.

The camp kitchen is simple but functional and has everything you need. It uses portable induction cooktops, so make sure your pots are magnetic. If not, the kitchen provides compatible pots and pans, which was helpful.

The playground is basic but more than enough for kids to enjoy, and ours had a great time playing there. It’s a very family-friendly environment overall.

This park isn’t luxury, but it provides everything you need for a comfortable and affordable stay in a fantastic location.

We would happily stay again.
Great location for a fishing weekend,  clean facilities and lovely owners. Good caravan sites out of wind.

Fantastic place to stay, awesome sights and great for fishing, whether in a boat or off 'long jetty' - which is so well equipped & a very short walk from the CP!
The Caravan park is clean and well cared for. Great service on check in.  Loved my plot! Will specifically ask for that one again ;-)

We stayed in unpowered, on grass and only a short walk to the sea side. This park is highly recommended to stay at, well kept ground with options to choose from with site. Updated amenities, well equipped camp kitchen with BBQ and entertainment for kids.

My name is tunjay ozer I'm from Melbourne first time stayed in port welshpool
The caravan park was perfect the cabins were perfect clean
I will be going back soon
The staff were very professional and kind
I do recommend to anyone going to Port welshpool to stay there ..👌👌👌👌❤️
Absolutely amazing close to beach great paths for riding a bike, staff are pleasant and caravan park is lovely clean amenities grounds are well maintained.
Great camp kitchen!!!!

We stayed overnight on the powered camp site tucked into a cove out of thewind . Sites were great size access to water and power . Easy to get into and close to very clean amenities . Access to long jetty at back gate and great besch to walk dogs and ourselves . Owner was very helpful .

Was great to be able to stay in a dog friendly cabin.  Was really tight with the 3 of us and a dog.  Would be great if the bunk room was removed altogether and had a sofa bed in the living area instead.  That would free up a bit more space.  Would also be great if there was a small fenced off area , including thr balcony so you could sit outside with the dog comfortably.  The shower was a good one.  Otherwise the park was nice.  Other guests were lovely along with the staff.  Other guests were very courteous and considerate.  No issues with phone reception.  We visited Foster which was a nice town and Agnes Falls.   We made some nice memories with our kiddo and first holiday with our pup.
Was lovely  quiet peace full  amenities four and a half star
kindness, excellent cleanliness...large spaces

Lovely caravan park. The site we had was spacious and private, despite being close to everything. Facilities were spotless. A big thanks to the park manager who very politely asked our neighbour to quieten down after 10pm.

Lovely camp, pristine amenities. Management was accommodating to our needs.
Local pub and fish and chips were great. Highly recommended.

The sites are absolutely massive The amenity blocks are very clean. My overall opinion of the park is very satisfying I will be definitely making a second booking. Staff are very friendly and helpful.

We arrived late and had a hassle free check in.
We stayed for a night in a unpowered campsite. The facilities are clean and easy access to where we camp overnight. Spacious.
Easy walk to the long jetty which what we came for to see and explore. This place is great. Had the most amazing time walking the long jetty, serene and peaceful.

Public toilet and bathroom is clean.
Good security.
Nice kid playground.
Only one problem is some one from caravan let their dog popping on the other empty camp site. They repeated that next day (they’re from slot 26). Even they picked it up but I don’t think that was allowed.

We had a powered site. It was the biggest site we have ever had and a great price.
The site was very private and sheltered.
The park was very clean and tidy, as were the shower / toilet blocks. The park is so close to the jetty and walking distance to the shop, pub etc.
The young girl on reception was very friendly and helpful. We will be back.
Beautiful location, our fur baby absolutely loved her time there.  She sulked when we returned home. We qull be back.

I booked the "Tiny Home" for a couple of days of fishing on the Long Jetty. The cabin was exactly as described on their website. The cabin was comfortable, very clean, well equipped and everything work fine. It had a comfortable bed, TV, powerful, quiet reverse cycle air-conditioner, table, 2 chairs, power outlets,  ensuite bathroom plenty of clean towels, liquid soap, shampoo and a front deck with 2 chairs and table. The kitchenette had a large fridge/freezer, plates bowls, glasses, cutlery, tea towel, sponge, detergent, microwave, kettle, sink, toaster, air fryer, complimentary UHT milk, instant coffee sachets, teabags, sugar. As other reviewers have stated, the park is very clean, has great environment, facilities and is serene even when full on an Australia Day long weekend. The staff are friendly, helpful, knowledgeable and switched on. Thanks for a great stay.

Stayed at big4 Long Jetty Caravan Park over the Australia Day long weekend 2026. The caravan park is super clean and tidy with green lush grass. We stayed on a powered site and the site sizes are very generous is size offering you some privacy and space between other campers. The park offers great facilities with a great camp kitchen, spotless amenities, playground for the kids and even a coffee van. It’s pet friendly for sites and selected cabins so you can bring your fur pets along to enjoy your holiday with you. Just a walk through the gates and you’ll be right by a stunning bay with views of the long Jetty which is a lovely walk. In town there is a pub (Rusty’s) which offer great meals, a general store, boat ramp if you decide to bring the toys along. It’s very peaceful and relaxing and the reception and staff are very friendly. Great spot to go exploring the Gippsland region, Wilson’s prom and many stunning beaches. Enjoyed and stay and hope to be back.
We stayed at the caravan site. Camp site was big and well maintained. Park was clean.
Can't wait to visit again at Easter time
Good place, good fishing, but sand flies just too much of a downside
Even though quiet and enough room  , only allowed to have one car on site
Good spot close to long jetty straight out the back door, make sure you try calamari from general store 10/10

Loved our stay there can't wait to come back again staff was friendly as people were great and friendly it was great seeing so many dogs in the park great location to the water and seeing the seal yesterday was amazing

Friendly helpful staff and well maintained campgrounds.
Bathroom and shower facilities was always
clean during our stay.

We had an amazing time at Long Jetty caravan park. The grass campsite was very spacious, with green soft grass. The facilities are new and very clean, the kids loved the play area and the Jetty is right out the back gate.

10/10 we loved our stay at the Long Jetty Caravan Park. Site was perfect and huge in size. The facilities spotless and close by to our site. Our grandson loved his daily icecream brought at reception and the great play park. Our favourite thing was the Charcoal Meat Man Food Van visiting the park, no need for cooking. The park is so close to so many lovely walks. The local pub the Rusty Gurnet only a short walk and great meals and happy hour. We will definitely be back again soon with more family members.
Fantastic park with great facilities and management. Experience was made even better by ‘That Charcoal Meat Guy’ serving up an assortment of goods for dinner. Definitely recommend.
We had a large site and grass was great.

Reasonably priced but basic facility. Operators helpful and welcoming. Mobile tower on site for great reception.
Issues - yes its dog on leash friendly, first thing that greets us on arrival is a steaming dog shit on our powered tent site. Also, these style of accom tend to attract ferals - had police on site during our stay due to a linatic teen who could not live without its phone for a few hours 😡

We had an great 3 nights stay at Long Jetty. Flat easy to access private sites for caravans and the toilets and showers were very clean even during the busy January holidays.
We’d read reviews about the sand flies and midges prior to our stay so we’re prepared to be eaten alive. I’m pleased to say that we had not one bite between us!
Good spot for a quiet short break - close to the jetty and walkable to the pub and general store.

Great quiet location, good fishing, ride your bike to the pub, fish n chip shop.
Older park, great playground
It's a lovely clean park. We had a very nice grassy powered site. It was our first time in Port Welshpool and it is a beautiful place.

Stayed 3 nights with our caravan. Sites were well maintained and clearly signed.
Amenities were easily accessed and impeccably clean. Facilities were well looked after and clean. Our 2 little dogs were welcomed. Staff friendly and helpful. A track down to the jetty was welcome.

We had sites 101 and 102. Powered sites. Basically the best 2 spots in the whole site tbh. Great place near the beach. Good facilities. Take your bikes and fishing gear.

They asked not to charge our Tesla - which is unusual. Also they swap and change sites all the time. So locking does not mean lock in.

Prachtige omgeving
Camping prima met ruime plaatsen
Mooie omgeving, aanrader : Agnes falls
En dichtbij Wilsons Promontory national Park
Good clean bathroom and shower
As usual had a fantastic time at long jetty caravan park,clean and well maintained park with friendly staff
Thoroughly enjoyed our stay. We were here for over 2 weeks at the busiest time of the year , Xmas and New Year. Amenities were kept clean.. park didn't feel full but it was.. highly recommend
Nice park with great views of the ocean and large caravan sites very dog friendly
Amazing location and great caravan park! Staff is helpful and friendly

Such a lovely quiet camp site, which is near the beach and we enjoyed our walk along the Long Jetty :) also spot amazing sunset everyday!
The site is clean, quiet and well-maintained. We would love to come again!
Lovely location, good sized block for our Campervan.  Excellent Naked Spud van.
Excellent family cabins in a great location at Port Welshpool.
We had a great caravan experience at Long Jetty caravan park, Port Welshpool. Great grassy site, good atmosphere very friendly staff.
Fantastic place to stay! Caught some flattys off the jetty, walked the dogs on the beach, only a short walk up to the pub. Great spot.

We really enjoyed our time here. It is such a beautiful area to holiday in.
The park was clean, well maintained and all residents abided by the rules.
It was a beautiful setting and the cabin we stayed in was comfortable and clean.
It is close to the jetty and main beach area.
Thank you for a wonderful break away from the hustle and bustle of our everyday lives.

Long Jetty is a well maintained caravan park. The owners are so lovely and go above and beyond. They always make us feel very welcome and are willing to help any way they can. Julie is exceptionally helpful. There is a pretty new toilet block which made the stay more enjoyable. The caravan park is right next to the jetty so makes for a beautiful walk and great sunset photos.

Clean and friendly.
Grassy and bushy sites.
Great walking along the pier and into the nearest pub and takeaway.
Had 6 nights. Huge site. The amenities were always clean with a full park. Right on the fore shore. Very relaxing spot.

the campsite itself was overcrowded, and quiet hours were not enforced at all—people were loud late into the night. Adding on to the nightmare the blood 🩸 sucking midges left red bite marks all across my legs and they are extremely itchy do not camp here.

The camp sites were spread well apart and large enough to feel that you are not camping on top of each other. Great friendly management. Clean amenities. Walking distance to the outdoor bowls club. People that love fishing will love this camp site as it’s situated opposite the massive jetty.
We stayed at a powered caravan site, it was close to the long jetty. The location is relaxing and close to a fishing spot, the amenenities were clean. The staff were friendly.

We decided to book a week at the park for 7 nights after Christmas with our Roof top tent but only stayed 5 nights which was a bit of a stretch.

PROS
- amenities close by clean and looks after
- sites were very generous and lawns well kept
- close by Great Southern Rail Trail to bike ride
- short ride to Welshpool (recommend visiting the Olive Branch on weekends)
- long jetty if you’re into fishing (we’re not)

CONS
- not really suitable for tent camping when surrounded by gigantic caravans and their pretentious owners (yes I understand it’s a caravan park)
- too many dogs not being managed by their owners who go into attack mode when you walk past to access amenities
- babies crying (who takes a small baby camping like seriously)
- weather bit cool for peak of summer and windy as all hell. Made it very dusty

We probably won’t return just because we’re exploring other parks but most definitely will never book peak season at a park in future. Far too many people for introverts
Fantastic facilities and location

Very nice camping with direct access to the coast.
Since the camping was almost full the amenities were not enough for all.
Overall experience was good!
Cabins were clean and comfortable lovely quiet park with good facilities and playgrounds. Pets welcome on request in designated cabins and camping areas 👍

Long Jetty Caravan Park is a fabulous place to stay. Located at Port Welshpool right on the sea.
The park is very well maintained, very clean grounds and amenities, super camp kitchen with an accessible fresh veggie and herb garden and large powered sites.
Friendly, helpful and welcoming staff.
Highly recommend.
Clean, quiet, beautiful location, friendly and helpful service

Another visit to this lovely park. Very helpful and friendly managers.  Many of the sites are sheltered. Camp kitchen has been recently updated and even has a nice little herb garden.  We really enjoyed our stay at this park.  The amenities were spotless with plenty of hot water for showers. It was great to be able to use the camp kitchen's BBQ. Sites were spacious and we appreciated the shelter from the wind. Easy walk to the jetty, fish and chips and the pub. Staff were all friendly. We will definitely be back.
Well maintained grounds, clean amenities, large sites & friendly staff... will definitely go back.
Fantastic park close to the jetty, ammenities are immaculate and Mark was great to deal with
Awsome location,spotless grounds and amenities.  Friendly staff

Great location and the staff are so friendly and thoughtful! The three families of our group really enjoyed our stay! The facilities were great and it was a lovely walk down to the jetty each morning. Thank you to the staff for being amazing! We will be back!

Long Jetty Caravan Park has a lot of potential, but unfortunately one major issue impacted our stay.

The biggest drawback is the camp kitchen. It is completely wide open with no doors at all. In bad or even mildly inclement weather, the kitchen becomes extremely difficult to use — it’s freezing, uncomfortable, and honestly feels unsafe. This is the first caravan park I’ve stayed at with a kitchen designed this way. Management really should address this, as a camp kitchen should be usable year-round and provide basic shelter from wind and rain.

On the positive side, the sites themselves are clean, well maintained, and generously sized. The grounds are kept nicely, and the reception staff are friendly, approachable, and open to feedback, which is appreciated.

Overall, this park has a lot of potential, but the poorly designed camp kitchen — by far the biggest issue — really lets it down. With improvements in this area, it could be a much better experience.

Very happy with the whole environment, staff,eliza and great service .they help me in booking at busy times by shuffling the rooms to accommodate me ..eliza is very helpful lady with big smile .
Cheers
Manish
Great spot to stay. Wonderful sites for our caravan. Would loved to have stayed longer.
A beautiful place.
Lovely caravan park, sand flies are the issue :(

Thank you for a superb few days.. The caravan sites were beautiful.. Lawns mowed like a golf course. The amenities were so clean you could nearly eat off them.. Finally the staff were extremely helpful and friendly.. Could not ask for better hosts.. Thank you 👍👍
The cabin had all that we needed & staff were friendly.  It was in a lovely location.  The cabin was nice and clean. We had a great stay.

Fantastic caravan park, very clean and tidy, it has everything you need, friendly staff and beautiful location! Highly recommended. Great price for value and very peaceful, we will definitely be back.
Thank you!
We only stayed one night in our campervan, would have loved to be staying longer, great park, great service, clean amenities and dog friendly
had lovley stay at the Long jetty carvan park 4 days in all ,grounds well kept and the amenitisas well staff amazing to happy to help .
Great park freindley staff well spread out with own spot would recomend powerd site

It was a good holiday.
Even though it was raining 🌧 we still enjoyed every minute of the holiday.

Beautiful grassy site. VERY large sites. Not crammed in here.
Staff very accommodating and helpful.
Peaceful
Quiet
Well equipped
Definitely recommend this park and the local restaurant “Rusty Gurnard”.

First impressions weren’t too fabulous. The site allocated to us was on the low part of the park and would have been lovely if the weather was more favourable. We were moved to a more suitable but not as picturesque area of the park. Upon talking with the park maintenance person who was so very welcoming and helpful, we learnt that the new owners have a lot of great plans for the park, as long as the council allows and works with them. Here’s hoping this happens as the park position is second to none.

Easy collection of key,friendly service.Boom gate security.
Cabin stay was very comfortable aircon and heating was perfect.
Comfortable bed and a good night sleep
Accomodation was satisfactory. Wished to bring a second car next to the cabin as we were two couples. It was always raining and inconvenient to walk out of the park to get to the car.
Despite challenging weather we had a great time here. It’s a great location, facilities are good and well maintained and pitches are large and in many cases, quite private. We love it!
Relaxing and beautiful place. Also amazing staff and service! Will definitely come back!

Enjoyed our stay, great with our dogs, beautiful location.
J & K Trippin in the  Trooper 🐕‍🦺🐕‍🦺

We only stayed in a tent so unable to comment on the rooms. Bathrooms ans cooking rooms were very clean and well maintained.
Only downside is the minimum stay requirement. Originally wanted a cabin for one night which was not allowed. Please reconsider this policy even if you were to charge a higher rate for one night stays. We will be back

Fantastic Caravan Park.
So close to the pier and the beach.

Highly recommend.

We thoroughly enjoyed our stay in our van on site 66 for two nights.
Very convenient location with access to the long jetty, and wonderful bbq kitchen area and warm comfortable chill out area with big tv!  We look forward to our next stay!
Great place and toilets etc were clean it was just a really nice place loved it👍🏼

Nice quiet park. When you want to get away its in a good spot very close to long jetty to have a crack at fishing. Toilets are clean and showers have all the pressure you will need especially the first shower in the male's shower block.
Friendly helpful staff. Lovely quiet spot with excellent amenties.

Lovely park. Nice big sites with bush & trees around the side for privacy and shade.Great price.
Nice new amenities block. My only negative comment would be the water pressure in the showers. I had a great shower while the person next to me got a dribble.
A great location and place to stay. Communication and staff very hospitable with very clean amenities
Very comfortable and clean, and bed & pillows were perfect. Quiet surrounds helped for a good nights sleep.

My sister and I stayed here for a night in mid-November. The powered campsite was beautiful, open green grass with plenty of space to set up our tents, although the grass was not nearly as luscious and green as Warrnambool’s civic green.
The receptionist was very helpful, even recommending the Rusty Gurnard as a great local pub. The caravan park backs right onto the beach and is a short walk from the Long Jetty. Overall a fantastic place with great vibes, affordable accomodation and beautiful sights.
The ammenities are freshly renovated and provide a great rest from the dirty camping life, the rec room and kitchen are easily accessible and have everything you need.

Great place to stay when it is not pouring rain my camp site was fairly dry but l can't say that for the rest of the park,some sites had 6"of water laying in them ..The whole park needs alot of fill brought in to take all the low spots out of every lot,, there is no joy paying $42 a night for a camp site when it is full of water.l camped on site 105 l think it was the highest site in the park. Showers were hot and toilets clean, management needs to attend this problem before I will camp there again Greg Browne
Very nicely setup

Small unpowered site for a boat as this is a fishing town
Camp kictchen, as per response , didn’t know it was getting renovated, could possible of had a sign stating why the fridge was off :)

We had a powered site with our Motorhome which was located in a quiet area and not far from the amenities. The amenities were very clean and modern and the park is located across from the beach and long jetty. All in all a great place to chill out & relax.
Lovely spot, great facilities, looked after so well. Highly recomend.
Stayed on a grassy powered site with caravan. Good size sites for a CP & amenities were modern & very clean. Fri Neely & helpful service

The staff at the park have been amazing. My family booked 2 power sites for 4 days on Saturday it rained and rained so we had water every. The staff helped work a plan and offered way to clean up the water in our tents . 100 out of 100 we will be back .
Have spent the last 32 years holidaying in Port welshpool and live every minute of it.
Neat and tidy park with nice big sites and friendly staff
A very comfortable and not so busy place for camping. We like the activities planned for the kids like movie night. We also like the area surrounding the camp site in general.

Awesome spot for a stop over or days away. Amenities a plenty and very well kept and clean even in peak times. Really helpful and friendly hosts. Thankyou for offering us a beautifully kept 'park'.
We will definitely be visiting again

Always a lovely stay clean amenities polite staff great location
Ali dogs are welcome which is so good

Wow big 4 you have made a huge difference toilet very clean staff friendly sites nicely mowed they had movie night and trick and treat for kids and a great playground
Well done 👏

The powered site we stayed on was large, flat and grassy for our 20’6 van. We enjoyed being close to the long jetty and having easy access to the Great Southern bike trail. The amenities at the park were clean and the were staff friendly. Camp fires were allowed in October.

Great peaceful place to stay . Short walk to long jetty for fishing , Ammenities are top notch , staff helpful , only issue was trying to get boom gate to open . Highly recommend , will be staying again .

We loved staying in a very nice un-powered caravan site. The park is cleverly designed to resemble a natural Australian landscape, while providing clean and well kept amenities. It's location to the sea is ideal for people who like an enjoyable walk through nature and spectacular scenery. We are planning to re-visit this park again very soon in the future.
Also, we'd like to say a big thank you Long Jetty staff for their friendly and accommodating help.

Congratulations Long Jetty Caravan Park Port  Welshpool. Your park is beautifully maintained, Cabin was well layed out with very comfortable beds. Friendly and accomodating staff What more could I ask for??? Hopefully we will see you again on our travels Cheers

Long Jetty Caravan Park was the perfect base for us when we had the opportunity to go on a whale tour off the Prom. We stayed two nights in a two bedroom cabin which was perfect for our needs. The park was clean, attractive and beautifully quiet at night and the staff were friendly and efficient. Great meals were available from the General Store and the local pub. The walk to the long jetty was close by and scenic. The whales were fabulous! We had an all round excellent experience.

Basic caravan park but very well maintained. Dogs accepted on lead.
Good shower & toilet facilities.
Peaceful & quiet. Very safe.
Great spot, lots of room with sites
Fantastic person at front desk. Sorted a high dryer spot due to rain. Lovely clean amenities. Hoping to come back for more nights

This place is Amazing!
We arrived after 5pm, we called them and advised them of our late arrival, and they were great ensuring entry details to our cabin were ready for us whem we arrived! Very close to the long jetty which is fantastic for fishing!
We will be staying there again!
We had a powered site grass well maintained and staff excellent
Just fantastic very comfy and warm had a great time fishing and squidding the very long wharf just at the back of the park perfect thank you for a lovely week
The only problem was a lack of shower curtains; a very easy fix
What a pleasant stay. Unfortunately we got some bad weather but even with some rain we enjoyed the calm of the place 👌🏻Keep eyes open to spot some 🐇🐇🐇

Clean park, spacious camping areas, toilet shower area very clean and good hot water pressure. Close to the famous long jetty and about 1.5km walk to town but it didn't take long.  Views on beach on one side of road and lovely houses to check out as you walk to town.  The pub was really lovely too.  Great getaway if you are looking for a quiet relaxing getaway.
Fabulous location.

Recently stayed 3 nights on a great site.
Excellent value for money on a non powered & no water site.
Beautiful green grass, excellent ammenities.
Peaceful park, very relaxing and in an excellent spot with walking distance to the beach!
Will definitely be back.
Excellent pub just down the road.
Enjoyed our stay
A great park, nice and quiet location, good ammenities, great service from very friendly staff. Thank you
Great little park in a good spot. We went after a fair bit of rain so it was soggy, but we were still able to park caravan up. Would definitely be back

We took our own RV so we didn’t use the rooms.  The park is super tidy and owners helpful.   There’s a nice or Kitchen recreational area a playground for kids & big kids at heart.  Toilets showers were well
Appointed and water pressure was very good

Very disappointing & disgusted I understand there has been rain but think we were put on the wettest site although there were multiple  sites dryer, you could not walk around without sinking into ground,  I think when ground is this saturated it should not be used, it is worst site I have experienced in my years of travel. Had we be advised that we would be in a water logged site I would have gone elsewhere.

Had an awesome time
All people and dog’s friendly
Would recommend anyone with or without dogs to stay
Had my little boy with me
Jack Russel x staffy xo

Stayed 3 nights at a powered site.  Amenities were spotless and well maintained.  Grounds beautiful, sites large and well spaced. Local pub was good for a meal.  Owners were very friendly and helpful.
Nice quiet place. Can walk to the local pub along the waterfront
Great peaceful caravan park

We stayed on a powered camp site , clean facilities and a good location to the water ( not great for swimming though  ) but good for a paddle with your dog and if into fishing a good location. Though not much else to do in the area expect the pub - we enjoyed the slow pace of things. Have already booked a future stay while we was there too , this time for the cabins ( will be our third stay in the park )

Thank you

My 2 nd stay at the park   I got the same cabin  which l appreciated everything clean and so comfortable  Cabin  has all u need for a great stay 😊 u don’t need to bring anything just ur clothes even have coat hangers  all the comforts of home
The peace and tranquility of the long jetty caravan park making it the Perfect escape from the hustle  & bustle of everyday life as soon as l arrived l felt a sense  of calm
It was very cosy the rain on the cabin roof is so relaxing the fresh air surrounded by the ocean close by  doing nothing has never felt more productive .

We had an unpowered site at the back of the park which proved very sheltered and well draining in the high winds and torrential rain throughout the night. The toilets and showers are of good quality. Camp kitchen had microwave, kettle, fridge n hot water though it blew a fuse in the morning. Rec room has a split system but didn’t use. Great location.

Great location right next to the jetty. Our powered site was roomy with plenty of space for our caravan and car. Facilities were new and very clean, although the other toilet block was kept locked due to the park being so quiet - a problem when the main block was closed for cleaning. We enjoyed our stay and will return - hopefully with better weather.
We were only there for one night, so we could have a whale cruise the next day. We stayed in their Tiny House cabin, which was perfect for 2 for a short stay.
Really nice fishing on the pier, very well set up! The Long Jetty Caravan park managers were really lovely.
Great little caravan Park, plenty of room, clean and tidy. Always enjoy staying here.

Nice clean park with grassy sites. It was a wet weekend for the AFL Grand final however the park and staff did a great job and put on a sausage sizzle on the day. Beautiful local pub, being the Rusty Gurnard and a fantastic pier to walk along and fish on. Thanks again to the staff at the park.
We stayed in a powered site, was great for the kids with park, Great location for fishing and walks. Amenities are modern and clean. Dump Point for caravans. Staff are really lovely and helpful.

We both absolutely loved our stay at the park and will definitely book again for Australia Day weekend. Staff are very friendly as well as the people staying there. Amenities were always clean and tidy. A great place just to wind down, fish or walk. Pub is also fantastic
Fabulous spot to enjoy a relaxing break. We had a powered site close to the jetty. The caravan park amenities were very clean and great that you can bring your dogs
Had a wonderful time-the cabin was brilliant.Very spacious,had everything we needed and the bed was so comfortable. Will be staying again for sure.
We got powered site 103 which is the only one with the beautiful view over the port and the long jetty. Service was awesome and they couldn’t do enough for us. Highly recommend.
Stayed in our caravan, was a beautiful spot. The amenities and park were spotless, will absolutely return.

Spent a very relaxing 5 nights and had a great time. Very friendly staff, very clean showers and toilets and plenty of room for caravan and car. A great place to stay if wanting to visit places like wilsons prom. Yarram, Foster and Agnes falls. Highly recommend.

Lovely park, lovely town!
Everything clean & working well, staff friendly & welcoming.
If they could have arranged a few more fish, it would’ve been perfect…

We spent five days of a ten days Caravan Auction and will definitely return for the other five days, possible in May 2025. We had a bad experience two months previously at Gerroa, also on a Caravan Auction, when a large tree snapped during a storm and a large limb fell onto the roof causing considerable damage. I had only finished repairs a week before we came to Port Welshpool.
Imagine our delight to find spacious level sites with low T Tree screening
Very lovely place to stay everything is 5 star
Very friendly staff and clean facilities we enjoyed our time at your caravan camp ❤️
Great spot in Victoria peaceful and this caravan park is ideal plenty of space and nice facilities. Stones throw from the shore

The cabin was comfortable and very clean. Alyssa was very helpful, called us when we’d left some luggage in room.
Recommend!
Great location.  Cabin had just been freshly painted and brand new stove and fridge.  Staff were very friendly. Bed was super comfy

Friendly and helpful staff. Cabin very clean.
Will stay again.

Here in my Campervan.
Beautiful place and location.Very quite this time of year (September).Very clean showers and toilets.local pub/petrol/coffee/newspaper and snacks 5 minutes drive to Welshpool.

Great  nature park close to great squid fishing along  the long jetty,
The staff are very friendly and helpful

This is a great sheltered haven in the storm!
A well kept campground with a modern shower block. Great local advice.
A perfect place to begin a whale adventure or try out the cycle trail.
Very clean, spacious sights.
Very recommended
Always enjoy staying at long jetty caravan Park our site was very relaxing.
Great peaceful location, nice clean park and very relaxing.
Great CP. great location. Pity the weather cut our stay short.

Excellent stay - Cabin perfect - Staff extremely helpful.
We will definitely be back.

Thoroughly enjoyed our stay at Long Jetty Caravan Park. Quiet, well positioned and large roomy powered site. The team were helpful and polite, the ground was well kept and amenities worked great and very clean! Would stay here again for sure!

Definitely would not recommend the cabins here. Very old, dated and expensive for middle of winter. Bathroom in particular was tiny, took a long time to get shower temperature right wasting a lot of water. Shower curtain.

Stayed at Port Welshpool Long Jetty Caravan Park mid August. Disappointed Wilsons Prom was closed the very week we were there, but we explored many of the other nearby towns and thoroughly enjoyed all we saw & did. Had great seafood meals @ local Rusty Gurnard & Port Albert Fish outlet. Foster was new to us and a friendly vibrant town. Toora has so much potential. Paton House and the knitters/ craft shop were inspirational, with talented super friendly owners. Hopefully the hotel will re-open!
Long Jetty Caravant Park was an ideal base! Our walk along the Long Jetty was wonderful, even in windy weather. Park was quiet and private. Although old, our basic cabin was clean, cosy & well equipped.
A great week away at the seaside! Thank you! We will return for a day @ the Prom next year......

The Caravan Park was excellent, and the cabin we had was everything we imagined - clean , well laid out - no complaints.|Close to everything along the waterfront and the Maritime Museum is well worth a visit
Great park at a beautiful location. Excellent clean new facilities.
Nice clean rooms, great communication. Great experience and would recommend
Stayed in cabin. Well maintained and very clean. Comfortable beds. Would stay again.
Great park. Recently renovated and great location
Great stay at long jetty caravan park in one of there cosy deluxe cabins. Looking forward to the warmer months to grab a bite and camp

Although it was cold and rainy the night I stayed, reception staff were friendly and let me choose where I wanted to set up. The toilet and shower blocks have been recently renovated and were clean and pleasant to use. The kitchen area was a little old and tired. A stove would have been a welcome addition. All on all though, good value for money.
Nice and quiet everything you need close to main Street and long jetty.
The wind and rain was relentless then I found refuge at Long Jetty Park, we had a dry site the amenities both modern and clean, before we headed off managed to get a walk out to end of jetty and back
My son and I also his dog stayed for 3 nights. The staff, accommodation and location suited us perfectly. We are looking forward to our next stay. 👍😃

My young son and I stayed in the couples cabin.
It was clean, roomy and the bed was really comfortable.
Thank you for making a 3 night trip into a home away from home.

Spent 11 days there with 2 ponies  dog and cat as he had to wait for a boat to King Island. Alisha was absolutely superb in here commitment to making our stay perfect.
Cannot thank her enough  will and would recommend park to everyone.

Thank you so much to the staff of Long Jetty Caravan Park who were so friendly and accommodating especially Alyssa. Our little family had so much fun.
The cabin we got was very neat and clean, it’s just enough for our family of 4. We got everything we needed and we feel pretty safe during our whole stay. We are already planning for our next stay. Thank you! 🙏

Great van park.
We rolled our swags out on an unpowered site and there was plenty of room.
We were able to have a fire tin which was a bonus.
Kids told me the playground was grouse.
The amenities were also in great condition.
We will certainly be returning…
Sites were quite large flat and quite protected, amenities were very good and cleaned well and daily we stayed for a week and visited most of the areas highlights staff very helpful and pleasant

We had a delightful stay in a large open caravan site. We were told we could change if we wanted another site more protected, but we were happy. The staff were friendly, helpful & fantastic. Great base to explore the surrounds. And, the rec/games room was great shelter to do my yoga! Many thanks.
Lovely neat property great location.  Very clean toilet and showers.  Friendly staff. Great to have a camp kitchen.

Enjoyed our stay, the cabin was clean, spacious, and cosy - the enclosed carport was great (especially with the heavy rain - kept us dry)
We would definitely come back/recommend for future stays.
The only thing I would suggest is maybe just have an automatic boom gate upon exiting ( instead of having to enter a code to exit)
Thankyou for an enjoyable stay.
Great place for the kids with having a play ground. The service was great nice and friendly staff. The toilets and showers block was always clean.
Great little campsite, immaculately clean and tidy, great location near the jetty and bowls club, friendly staff

Arrived on a wet cold June day so fortunately lots of vacancies. Big lawn area, big camp kitchen. Next to long jetty and 1 minute drive to boat ramp. Flywire screens need repair before summer to prevent mozzies. Camping fires allowed. No supermarket in area so come well stocked. Overall would recommend
Cozy and convenient room.

Had such an amazing time at Long Jetty Caravan Park, we stayed in a cabin over the long weekend, cabin, park and grounds are kept clean and tidy, staff are friendly and welcoming.
We will be coming back for another family adventure

The dog friendly cabin we stayed in was clean and well presented though it was quite tired looking and in need of an update.
The manager Alisa was so kind to put the heater on prior to our arrival!
Port Welshpool is truely a lovely spot to visit as well as the surrounding towns and tourist spots 😊

We had a really nice weekend stayed 3 nights on a powered site. Spacious sites. Well cared for caravan park lawns are nicely mowed.
Very happy with our stay. Highly recommend ⭐️
First time stay and will be back. Impressed with park, space and amenities. Well managed and looked after park.
Great caravan park. Huge sites, clean amenities and grassy sites.
We had a very pleasant stay.We could have our dog with us in the cabin which is great,cabin very clean and comfortable.

Shared a five day stay at the camp ground with friends.  The sites were perfect with protection from the wind and very private.  The amenities were spotless and lots of hot water for showers.  Very friendly staff and welcoming on arrival. The fish and chips were good and the hotel offered very good selection on their menu.
Our first stay at Long jetty and certainly will not be our last.  Thank you
Lovely park.great location 👌
Caravans sites were great and new bathrooms.. we would stay again happily
Lovely people and a hidden gem
Best park within 100's of km.

On a recent fishing trip, my mate and I stayed in a cabin at Long Jetty Caravan Park. The park was well laid out with plenty of parking space for cars  with trailers, the van sites are large and on grass. The cabin had a very spacious living area, bed rooms were fine and the unit was very clean. The Management were helpful and were planning continual improvement for an more enjoyable stay.

Had a beautiful large grassy site tucked away in this lovely caravan park. Management were very welcoming. Lovely clean ammenities and very close to the beach and jetty. Plenty to see and do around surrounding areas.
Thank You for our lovely stay.
Des and Jeannette Sykes

Great caravan park, great location. We had a powered site, large site with trees on either side which created privacy. Nice clean facilities & best fishNchips in main street. We'll definitely be back👍

We had cabin 6 which was great for us… clean and tidy with comfortable warm bedding.
Highly recommended!
Very clean and tidy, friendly people, we had a caravan and there were  lots of open and secluded camp and caravan spots.
Highly recommended.

Great service & location.
I couldn't complain about anything even if I wanted to 👍
Had a great stay just disappointed that you can't put more that 1 car inside

We thoroughly enjoyed our stay at Port Welshpool Caravan park , friendly staff clean amenities , only one complaint no Fish , 😢🤣 but we visited Agnes Falls and Minneha,ha  falls which was well worth a visit. Yours Sincerely Geoff and Judy Fischer

Wow! What an improvement. Stay here yearly for a family get together & finally there is a caretaker putting some live into the oark. Very friendly service. Park looks great, clean & neat.
Wish them all the best & thank you for a great stay.
Side note, power went out through no fault of theirs yet they kept guests updated on status of return. Thoughtful of them
What a great park. The sites were huge and a lot of them very private.  Lots of grass. The facilities were modern and very clean.  Definitely recommend.
This a wonderful caravan park.  New amenities and well maintained grounds.  It was a pleasure to stay here.  Easy walk to the Long Jetty and town.
Friendly team, well maintained sites and very clean facilities made for a great experience.

The caravan park was beautiful, neat, clean, toilets were cleaned regularly.
The staff the run the place were super kind and happy to help. Honestly the nicest place we’ve stayed in a long time.
Sunsets were magical.
Nice caravan park, with exceptional clean toilet/ shower block and great hot water. Close to the jetty
Beautiful park, very nice location and very nice and helpful staff. Will be back
We had site 6 and enjoyed our stay the amenities were clean and well maintained the outdoor areas were the same we will be back
The cabin was comfortable, warm heater, bed was comfortable, nice hot water, Great location walking distance to the pier and small drive to Wilson Prom..
We stayed in a tent so cant rate the rooms. But the service was great. Staff very friendly. Location was awsome. Already planing our next trip. Our biys loved it
A well maintained park with modern amenities and large sites.

Great caravan park with big sites.
Very clean facilities

Highly recommend this caravan park
Very clean and quiet with a great location

Stayed here for 3 nights in a dog friendly cabin, the service was excellent right from ringing to book the dates. The cabin was extremely clean, the bed was comfortable with warm covers. The park itself is very clean & tidy. We would highly recommend Long Jetty Caravan park. We will also stay there next holiday that way.

Beautiful, well maintained park- massive powered sites!!
Management was fantastic, really helpful and friendly
Planned to stay 3 nights, stayed 4- will be back

A beautiful spacious holiday park. Plenty of space between vans. Amenities very good. Location wonderful. Just out the gate to the jetty. Loved our time there and will return. A short ride to the Rail Trail for done great cycling.
We had Cabin 8 - very spacious, clean and comfortable. A lovely stay - thank you 😊
Friendly place next to Long Jetty and beach.  Large site so plenty of space for campers, trailers etc.
Such a nice site, clean and quiet and tidy. grass was maintained so well. Amazing. Best caravan site we have so far. We will definitely be back.
Unpowered site.Great pet friendly spot.

Great caravan park in an awesome spot in a gorgeous town!!

The amenities were modern, clean and convenient.
The sites were private and well set-out.

After hours check in was too easy!

We'll be back!
awesome!

We stayed here for three nights and loved everything about the place . Staff friendly and helpful , sites really big and very neat , toilets and showers spotless . We will definitely be back . Thanks folks.
Antonio  Bennett
Stayed at the caravan park .  Sites huge .  So close to the jetty .  Even caught 2 flathead .  Nice quiet spot .  Amenities cleaned daily .
Great place for fishing 🎣

Clean and well maintained site. Friendly staff that allowed you to enjoy the space. Our site was lovely and quite, mostly private. Great spot for families and dogs! Shame some campers did not care about  making sure firepits did not burn the grass! Highly recommend this quite little spot, local pubs and towns very pretty with charm 4.5 out of 5!!

A great park with large spaces. Well treed and cared for grass sites. Power and water. Many sites are very private being hidden away in treed and shrubed set up areas. Amenities were excellent. Park is right beside the beach and the restored Long Jetty. Rates are good but do go up over public holidays and special events. Many people staying on our visit were keen fishing and boating people as a boating paradise awaits you right beside the park. Very popular for fishermen and women. A bike trail is available to take you back to Welshpool and is part of the heritage bike rail track. Dogs are also welcome and all seemed well controlled by people on our visit.
Lovely quiet location, clean amenities and grounds.
We had a powered site for our caravan.staff very helpful. Enjoyed our stay...it's a shame if it's true they are no longer  doing travel auctions
Will definitely stay here again

A great place for kids to play and be near the water.
Facilities clean and park tidy.
Playground for children was great and central.
Dog friendly and lots of grass areas.
Quiet, friendly, well maintained caravan park. Close to the jetty, boat ramp and great Southern rail trail.

A lovely caravan park with large sites surrounded by shrubbery, campfires permitted (out of fireban period), good clean modern shared amenities, camp kitchen and outdoor shared bbq area.  Service was good and very helpful when our dog ran away during a storm. right next to the Long Jetty and a 5 min walk to a great pub with good meals. Will stay again! 😀

We stayed on a powered site, sites are really roomy and nice and grassy . Toilets were very clean and park was full . Staff are really accommodating and nice . Only thing is a little pricey at $70 per night as there is only a play ground for the kids . Location is great. Great if u like fishing and the pub is good too . Yes we would go there again even though pricey . Park is very clean and bins are always emptied. Happy camping..👍👍
Great campsite - not too big and quiet even when fill. A very relaxing spot and make sure you check out the gorgeous town of Toora

Very clean park and friendly staff. They organised a food truck one night for our convenience.
The sites were very big and spread apart.
Definitely recommend.
We loved our stay so much we have booked the same powered sight for next Easter. The toilets and showers were so clean and plenty of hot water for a great shower.,
Very spacious grass covered areas. Toilets and showered modern and very clean. We had a fantastic week at this park. Highly recommended.

We stayed here over the Easter break. I loved the park. It was very well organised and the owners were very kind and helpful. The facilities were excellent. The campsite was clean and had a large lawn. There were bins everywhere, the toilets were excellent and very clean. We would be happy to return. I highly recommend this place.
The staff were very friendly. All the facilities are well maintained and very clean. Great value.
Great spot, hot powerful showers, excellent reception.  Pointed out the best fish and chip shop just down the road.
Clean, spacious.
Great park. The managers are helpful and the park is relaxed and not overcrowded.

Absolutely loved this Caravan Park, really neat and tidy, great toilet and shower facilities. The sites are really big, we could put our Carvan, Hylux and boat on site with extra room. The Staff where so friendly and helpful and the position to the Long Jetty and the beach was perfect. Definitely stay here again and would recommend it highly.
Had a great time thank u
The park was awesome! Fantastic powered sites. Extremely clean amenities and fantastic location. Will definitely be back.
We had a very peaceful fishing trip, weather was perfect and location is amazing!! Cabin very clean and comfortable, not lacking for anything.
Fire pits were a problem.  The smoke was an issue  diu to ling disease

Our second time coming to the park. First time we stayed at a powered camp site but this time we booked the pet friendly room and it was great to have out Jack Russel with us. Incredible boating location and great fishing from the pier. Cannot recommend enough.

Amenities are new and spotless
Excellent pressure and hot water in the shower
Quiet location
Connected to the rail trail network
On our whole rail trailing trip this was simply the best spot to stay- even when it entails an extra 10 kms to get onto the trail.

Love this park , extremely well kept, excellent amenities , Customer focused staff
Highly recommend
Alan
Excellent staff
Great place to stay friendly staff
Excellent and clean facilities. Lovely owners and staff. Beautiful location. Recommended!
We stayed in our own caravan. Great size powered sites. Dog friendly which is good.
Friendly helpful staff, exceptionally clean toilets and facilities. Rented powered tent site. All good

Long Jetty Caravan Park is within a stones throw to the Long Jetty, it's a great area to explore nearby towns. Staff are welcoming & always happy to help or just a smile , grounds are kept immaculate & clean. Stayed in a pet friendly cabin which was spotlessly clean , had a great time will definitely be back to this lovely caravan park
Great place to stay. Super friendly staff and the cleanest park. Fits a large fishing boat. Thanks for our stay
Quiet, peaceful spot. Modern amenities with lovely high toilets! Close to jetty and General Store has great food
Pleasant stay in a grass, powered site. Very nice amenities block.

Great spot
Enjoyed our stay we will be back
Comfortable mattress great water pressure in shower. Nice and clean very happy with our stay
Great caravan park, large sites.
The surroundings of the Park itself are lovely. I also noticed that care was taken to give people their own space which was also great! Very lovely stay 🙏
Long Jetty Caravan Park is so well maintained. The pier is an amazing spot to fish. Such a nice little getaway.
A great caravan park with great amenities and sites . Staff were very helpful and friendly. The jetty is a great place to visit as well as the pub .
Great park. Enjoyed our stay. Large sites, walk to beach and pier and new amenities block. Also very dog friendly.
Great place for few days rest -fishing, swimming and bike riding on rail trails. Good sites and park well situated. Friendly staff
Caravans site very generous sized protected from most wind some sites more exposed than others good location good amenities reasonably priced with friendly staff will be back in near future
Such a hidden gem and perfect service 😍
Great place to stay. Clean ammenities and generous caravan sites.

We were very happy to stay in the ‘Couples Cabin’ at the Long Jetty caravan park. The cabin was spacious and spotlessly clean. There were lovely and extensive views of grassed areas and gardens and it was a quiet and comfortable location. (In particular, the bed was extremely comfortable.) The management was flexible with the booking as we had arranged a cruise along the east coast of Wilson’s Prom, which was weather dependent. They were happy to postpone our booking if the cruise did not take place and work in with an alternate date if necessary. This was very much appreciated (but not actually needed.) The aircon and television worked well and contributed to our comfort and rest.

The receptionist was
Very friendly and helpful.
Nice, big, private caravan sites.
Clean facilities.

We stayed in our own camper in a powered site. Friendly and helpful staff, well maintained spots, the showers and toilets (assuming the newer block) were spotless. Enjoyed the hot showers. We went to get away - lovely and quiet, great access to the jetty.
A great spot close to the jetty, very friendly staff, clean amenities.
Excellent park lovely staff.  Very well kept and clean. We thoroughly enjoyed our visit and will definitely be back.  Thankyou
Fantastic caravan park, friendly staff, clean facilities, loved the good size sites, will definitely be back. Highly recommend

Really great location for all water sport and fishing.
Quiet and clean park with all the amenities you’ll need.
We stayed 3 nights and paid for 2 - super deal!!
Thank you
Shirley & Ross M

Tiny room was lovely and clean Great comfortable bed and bathroom facility
Only fault there was just nowhere to hang any clothes for next day use
No dustpan to pick up crumbs and no screen door so main door had to be closed at all times.
The powered site was great and all the facilities were nice and clean, the staff were lovely and the location was amazing if you want to unwind and relax 😌

Excellent service from staff, who allowed us to both shorten our stay AND refund the extra 2 days due to ANOTHER weather cancellation of our Wildlife Coastal Cruise! Sites adequate, if somewhat uneven, and generally well grassed - nice to see this time of year. We moved on before the long weekend crowds arrived, so the amenities access wasn’t problematic.
Beautiful location with plenty of space for all campers. We had a great stay.
Fabulous location with easy access to the beach and Long Jetty.
Amenities best yet. Very high standard. Loved the bush feel of the site

We stayed in our caravan and thoroughly enjoyed the experience. Close to the long pier and beach area and the sites were spacious and provided easy access.  Toilets and showers were clean and well maintained and staff were pleasant and helpful. Iwould thoroughly recommend the park.
A nice, clean park. Well set out, great location next the jetty & a short stroll to the pub & general store. Staff were friendly, happy & went over the top to help. We'll be back, thank you.
Large sites. Close to Jetty

Friendly
Clean
Affordable
Thanks team for having us

Whilst having a shower and others were too, I had but a trickle of hot water until others turned their Taps off, very disappointed. Also the amenities would be more comfortable on hot days if there were ceiling fans, it’s like an oven.

Stayed a few nights with extended family across multiple cabins. I stayed in the deluxe cabins and they were really great, spacious and well looked after. Most importantly, the bed was comfortable! The older cabins are smaller and a bit dated. The location is great if you want to walk across the road to the beach, however it is far from anything else since everything in the region seems to be closed (looks like many businesses didn't survive Covid sadly).
There is a nice playground for children to play on too.

Caravan site was great although a little short on grass. The amenities were excellent and staff were very professional and helpful. The location was fantastic with great access to the jetty and the beach, shame the fish weren't biting.
We were very happy with our stay at long jetty.

Some much bigger sites than average, suitable for bigger rigs (vans and utes) also more private and room for your set up. Nice well grassed sites. Very close to the beach and pier. Good bathroom facilities and good common room and adequate camp kitchen too. Very nice operators, very friendly.

Stayed six nights in caravan, plenty to see in area. Site was lovely grass and amenities very clean. One of the best caravan parks we have stayed in. Great walks along sea front and burgers at only shop were great.

My first time at Long Jetty Caravan Park will not be my last. What a wonderful place. Beautiful green grass, I didn't need to put the camping mat out. The amenities are high quality and clean. It's dog friendly and my ratbags loved the beach, just 200m from camp. Thank you so much to the wonderful staff. See you next time. 😄🐾

What a lovely park. We had a huge site. Nice clean modern amenities and friendly staff.  Its next to the Bay and the jetty. It was nice a quiet and protected from the wind by trees. Close to Agnes Falls and an hour from the amazingly beautiful Tarra Bulga National Park.
This caravan park is in a very quiet but great location. The sites are very spacious and the amenities are extremely clean. We enjoyed our time here.

Good sites, good facilities, good staff, good location.
( not relevant but: pub closed on Monday and Tuesday, and even general store ( which doesn’t sell bread ), seemed to be closed on Monday too).

Great area for camping, caravan sites are very big and private, got a bump site for modern vans .
All up a great place to stay or consider.
Thanks to all the staff.
Very nice caravan park. Lovely & very helpful couple running the park.  Huge well maintained sites. Very new & well maintained amenities.
Great park, great  service, great  amenities. Will be back again.

Beautiful Place
Great Facilities
Professional Staff informative
Kind Considerate Accommodating
Looking 👀 forward to my next Stay.
What a great caravan park,  the site sizes are really generous.
Great quiet park next to Long Jetty and a short stroll to town. The park is beautifully maintained with large grassy powered sites. Dog friendly and great price

This was a really lovely place to stay. The staff were super friendly and from the back gate it’s a short walk to the jetty. The bathrooms were clean, I didn’t use the other amenities, but the rest of the grounds were well maintained. I was staying on my own so I love that I could bring my dog to the facilities with me instead of leaving him tethered at the site. It would have been nice if other dogs were on leashes as they’re meant to be, particularly the little brown fluff ball that wanted to attack my kelpie, otherwise it was a lovely friendly atmosphere.
Good park, grassy sites
Had great time spent most of the time fishing with good tesultd
The campsites are clean, quiet, kitchen in a good condition, the toilets and showers are new, hot water available. Be careful at the sliding door to the office I pinched my thumb 😫😉

Great position to the forefront and jetty.
Well protected caravan sites . Simple and clean.
Old cabin (dog friendly) very small but clean.  Comfortable bed, shower a bit slippery.  Also had a balcony which was good.
I love my experience I will be coming back again for sure I had a unpowered site number 7 such a lovely spot
Nice quiet location.

Best camping in welshpool. Great location to long jetty, boat ramps, multiple beaches and a beautiful small town with a great attitude.
